body: Pipeline started: Cognitive load and Neurodiversity x Accessibility. Domain resolved: accessibility-ai (existing). Depth: standard. Platforms: linkedin, instagram, x, newsletter.
Research complete for accessibility-ai. 12 items, 8 sources. Notes: research/domains/accessibility-ai/notes/2026-05-02-cognitive-load-neurodiversity.md
NotebookLM step complete (manual mode — notebook_id is TBD). 5 prompts staged in notebooklm-prompts.md.

Pipeline complete for 'Cognitive load and Neurodiversity x Accessibility'. Domain: accessibility-ai (existing). 12 research items / 8 sources captured. 4 drafts staged (LinkedIn, Instagram carousel, X thread, Newsletter). All humanized against _writing-signature/profile.md. Notion sync queued for notion-publisher agent. 2 ideas added to ideas-feed.md. 5 NotebookLM prompts staged.

Morning sweep 2026-05-04 | accessibility-ai: notes age=2d, pending NLM prompts=10, new ideas=2 (unpromoted), NotebookLM=connected. Escalating research-domain-lead: (1) notebooklm-bridge for 10 prompts, (2) domain-researcher Monday fresh-signal pull.

ESCALATION: 10 unanswered NotebookLM prompts in research/domains/accessibility-ai/notebooklm-prompts.md. Dispatch notebooklm-bridge. Also: Monday sweep — dispatch domain-researcher for accessibility-ai fresh signal. Both can be coordinated in one research-domain-lead invocation.

7 items, 3 new prompts, 2 ideas. Topics: WCAG 3.0 contrast algorithm (undetermined, APCA dropped), WebAIM Million 2026 failure data (95.9% of sites, 3.9% of elements), WCAG 3.0 March 2026 working draft (scoring model, non-binding), axe-core 4.11.x AI-assisted guided testing + RGAA support, native dialog+popover Baseline status (custom ARIA focus-trap now redundant), APG dialog pattern alignment with native HTML, alt-text LLM benchmark gap (no peer-reviewed head-to-head exists). 2 content candidates promoted.
